title: Counter-Conditioning and Desensitization for Reducing Dog Reactivity
raw_text: Whole Dog Journal evidence-based guide: DS/CC for reactivity. Start 30-60 second exposures, repeat 3-5 times per session. Increase intensity only when dog consistently calm at current level. Practice minimum twice weekly, daily preferred. Sessions 5-45 minutes, never stressful. Begin below threshold distance where dog notices trigger without reacting. Process can take months depending on history. Systematic gradient: distance reduction phase by phase. Parallel walk technique for dog-dog reactivity.

metadata.notes: Whole Dog Journal - established evidence-based dog publication, veterinary contributors
